title: Official-source discovery: NYC address/BBL/BIN resolution (Geoclient/Geosupport/GeoSearch)
objective: Document current official NYC address resolution sources with endpoints, auth, limits, fields, cadence, and limitations; no guessing
business_reason: Bootstrap requirement: prove official-source-researcher operational; feeds M1 connector work

acceptance_scenarios.expected: current endpoint(s), auth model, rate limits, pagination/N-A, update cadence, field definitions for BBL/BIN resolution, with source URLs and retrieval date

acceptance_scenarios.input: multiple candidate address services (Geoclient vs GeoSearch)
acceptance_scenarios.expected: both documented with official status, differences, and recommendation
explicitly marked unknown; no guessed endpoints, fields, or units

progress_log.message: Research complete with sources and retrieval dates
